mnemonics: P: Pattern, A: Accept, B: Reject
keyPoints: Any context-free language L has a pumping length p
For all w in L, w of length at least p can be divided into three substrings: A, B, and C
A has length at least 1, B has length at least 1, and C has length at least 1
For all i >= 0, ACiB is also in L
If ACiB is a finite string, then we can repeat the process to get an infinite string in L
If ACiB is an infinite string, then we can remove the first i characters and the resulting string ACiB is also in L
